content.en:
"With these invincible domain ancestors of the Battle Gate, the Xuanxu Saint Realm is worry-free!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He also knew very well that although the value of the Holy Monument was very high, it was not to that terrifying level, so that the Holy Gate would not send a large number of one- or two-step invincible domain ancestors to fight with the Battle Gate.

Once it involves a large number of one- or two-step invincible domain ancestor fights, it will definitely involve the fight of the peerless domain ancestor, and the battle will be completely escalated.

Moreover, the eyes of the Ancestors of the Superior Domains of the Major Holy Gates were still on the Primordial Ancestral Realm, and obtaining a little treasure in the Primordial Ancestral Realm was more valuable than a Holy Monument.

Even the Fire Pattern War Ancestor, his body was also in the Primordial Ancestral Realm, and only one clone stayed in the War Ancestor Realm.

Therefore, Ye Tian was not worried that there would be no superior domain ancestor coming.

......

As time passed, the day of the birth of the monument was getting closer and closer.

On this day, the monument was completely born.

Bang!!!!

An incomparably huge holy monument stood in the central area of the Xuanxu Holy Realm, and its power continued to spread, and countless domain ancestors knew that a supreme treasure had been born in the Xuanxu Holy Realm.

So, the eyes of one of the domain ancestors looked in the direction where the holy monument was located.

Most of the Domain Ancestors did not know about the existence of the Holy Monument, but a few Supreme Domain Ancestors did know about the Holy Monument.

"The Holy Monument has finally been born!"

The Herring Fish Domain Ancestor and the other Supreme Domain Ancestors on the Battle Gate Supreme Strength List were excited one by one.

Once the Holy Monument is born, they can obtain the Holy Monument quota and enter the Holy Monument World to practice, and quickly improve their soul Holy Light.

In particular, a few of them were in the Supreme Domain Ancestors who were about to condense the Holy Soul, and once they entered the Holy Tablet World to cultivate, there was almost a ninety percent chance of condensing the Holy Soul.

In that case, they would be able to immediately attack the Invincible Domain Ancestor, and their strength would reach an incomparably terrifying level.

Such a big opportunity, they finally waited.

Whoa!!!

A Famous Powerful Domain Ancestor flew towards the Holy Monument, and Ye Tian had already come to the Holy Monument.

"1000 worlds!"

Ye Tian looked at the 1,000 world entrances presented on the Holy Monument and was immediately surprised.

Under normal circumstances, many monuments have only a few dozen places, and the better monuments have hundreds, but monuments with thousands of monuments are very rare.

"Originally, I only sold a few dozen places, and there are more than 900 places, most of which can be given to the domain ancestors of the human race, and the remaining places can continue to be sold to Zhanmen or other supreme domain ancestors!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

Of course, the price set now must be very high, even if it is a first-grade Supreme Domain Ancestor, he can't afford to pay this price with all his wealth.

In short, he doesn't care if others can afford it, he just decides like that.

No matter how expensive it was, there were definitely many Supreme Domain Ancestors who wanted a place for a holy monument.

---------------

"This is a holy monument!"

Some foreign Supreme Domain Ancestors saw this holy monument and immediately went crazy.

They also saw Ye Tian, and they knew very well that Ye Tian would definitely not give them the place of the Holy Monument.

However, once they rushed into the world in the Holy Monument and refined the core of the Holy Monument World, it was equivalent to forcibly obtaining a quota, and even Ye Tian would not be able to deprive them of their quota at that time.

So, desperately, they rushed to the holy monument.

"Look for death!"

Ye Tian made a move.

"Golden Silk Holy Technique!"

Puff puff!!!

In the void, countless golden threads cut towards those supreme domain ancestors, and they were killed in seconds one by one, without any resistance at all.

The strength of this group of Supreme Domain Ancestors is only ordinary Supreme Domain Ancestors or third-grade Supreme Domain Ancestors, and there are not even a few second-grade Supreme Domain Ancestors, they are simply a group of ants, and they dare to rush into the Holy Monument?

Even if he was an invincible domain ancestor, if he dared to do so at this time, he would be killed by the one- or two-step invincible domain ancestor of those few battle gates in secret.

The number of places in the Holy Monument, each of them is very precious, and the Battle Gate will naturally not let these places be snatched away casually.

"The Supreme Domain Ancestor who has obtained the Holy Monument quota in the Battle Gate can now enter!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Thank you Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor!"

The herring fish domain ancestor and the Wulong domain ancestor and others flew into the holy monument one by one, each picked a world, and flew in from the entrance of the world.

As long as they completely refine the world core and close the world entrance, others will have no way to enter it at all, and there will be no way to disturb their cultivation.

"Yue'er, you and your son, daughter, and my sister, choose a world to enter!"

Ye Tian said.

"Yes, husband!"

Xiao Yue responded.

Subsequently, Xiao Yue, Ye Xingchen, Ye Xingyue and Ye Yu each entered a world.

After that, the top domain ancestors of the human race, who had already been determined, also entered the holy tablet world one by one.

Prior to this, Ye Tian conducted an assessment and selected a total of 158 genius domain ancestors, and now they all entered the Holy Monument World, which made countless domain ancestors envious.

After all, these people are only top-notch domain ancestors, and it would be a waste to enter the Holy Monument World!

The Holy Tablet World is of great use to the Supreme Domain Ancestor who has condensed the soul holy light!

Of course, once a top-notch domain ancestor or an ordinary supreme domain ancestor enters the Holy Monument World, his strength will naturally increase very quickly.

Especially the top domain ancestor, once he cultivates in the holy tablet world, he will be able to break through to the supreme domain ancestor realm 100%.

"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, I should be able to go in, right?"

The light-clothed saint appeared and asked with a smile.

"Light-clothed saintess, you can get a spot!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Wow!

The light-clothed saintess flew into the Holy Monument World with a smile, making all the domain ancestors envious.

Next, Ye Tian divided a clone and continued to select a group of domain ancestors among the many domain ancestors of the human race, but in any case, if you want to get a holy tablet quota, even if it is a human race, at least you have the cultivation of a top domain ancestor, otherwise it will really be a waste to give them a holy tablet quota.

After all, in the Holy Tablet World, the effect of cultivation is the best at the beginning, and then it is equivalent to generating resistance, and the effect is getting worse and worse, and if it is only in the later stage, it is equivalent to a good cultivation treasure land.

Otherwise, the monument would be worth more than that.

At this time.

Many holy gates and holy places in the Dark Sanctuary know that the Xuanxu Holy Realm has given birth to a holy monument, and there are as many as 1,000 places.

It was normal for a Holy Realm Birth Monument to be born, but they didn't expect it to be born so quickly and with so many places.

All of a sudden, many forces shook and sent people to the Xuanxu Holy Realm one after another.

Moreover, many Supreme Domain Ancestors also began to negotiate with Ye Tian, wanting to obtain a place for the Holy Monument!
